notableEvents.label: Gary Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez singles on a ground ball to third baseman Alec Bohm. Garrett Mitchell to 3rd. Sal Frelick to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Brad Keller. Garrett Mitchell scores. Sal Frelick to 3rd. Luis Rengifo to 2nd.
